title: Totemicy
description: my first mod, its based around magic totems!
body:
![title made up of different items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51ad990dd12c4719432d2adf90fe73350a758345.png)




**Made for Hackcraft:**
https://hackcraft.hackclub.com/

![hackcraft banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31f47ff2022f96e548d1c4aaa2e48112a9712a3b.png)

As seen on the Modrinth homepage:

this is my first mod so I hope people enjoy it! 

Totemicy is a mod based around consumable "totems" which grant unique buffs/abilities but most have some form of downside/risk, offering a risk/reward playstyle with the oppurtinity for build variation. The mod is heavily combat focused, with a handful of non-consumable weapons/abilities with special functions. The mod is quite silly and also comes with three cosmetics, so have fun! :3 

**Items:**

<details>
<summary>Item List</summary>

- **THUNDEROUS TOTEM**: SUMMONS LIGHTNING BOLTS IN A CIRCLE AROUND YOU
- **KING OF THE SEA'S TRIDENT**: A VERY STRONG MELEE WITH A DASH ABILITY ON RIGHT-CLICK
- **BEEKEEPER'S TOTEM**: SUMMONS LOTS OF BEES AND CURES YOU OF POISON WHILE GIVING YOU REGENERATION
- **SACRIFICIAL TOTEM**: SACRIFICES SOME HEALTH IN EXCHANGE FOR DAMAGE AND SPEED 
- **COSMETIC AMETHYST SPEAR AND NEGATIVE BLADE**: REGISTER AS A BACKSLOT STYLED ITEM WHEN IN OFFHAND, JUST COSMETIC
- **BLIMBO**: CAN BE WORN ON YOUR HEAD.
  
<details>
<summary>Blimbo knows best</summary>

![facts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c30c69b412089a8297d0e8d9c80662fa3471d38e.jpeg)


</details>


- **GAMBLING BUDDY**: HAS A 30% CHANCE TO GIVE YOU 5 MORE GAMBLING BUDDIES UPON USING
- **FINAL GAMBIT**: KILLS USER AND SUMMONS A WITHER IN THEIR 
- **Burrowing Claw**: sends tha player into a state for a period of time where they deal damage upon contact (exiting the state) adn they don't take damage (some sources do deal damage)
<details>
<summary>How burrowing claw works</summary>

It uses riptide so it's pretty buggy

</details>

- **Throw**: throws ALL entites (except the user) in the direction the user is facing with an upwards boost
- **Watermelon Sword**: an early game edible sword

- **Nail**:inspiried by the nail from hollow knight, knocks you back in the opposite of the direction you're facing upon hitting an entity

- **Vampiric Dagger**: a blood covered dagger that allows you to heal upon hitting an entity


</details>

All recipes are in the gallery.
